_comment: Curated learner-friendly definitions for regulatory-reporting core concepts FIBO ships with no skos:definition. Grounded in each class's FIBO superclass/axioms; applied by to_okf as definition_provenance: curated (never overrides a real FIBO definition).

definitions.title: financial markets regulation
definitions.definition: Body of rules and requirements, set by regulators, that governs the conduct of financial markets and their participants (e.g. MiFID II).

definitions.title: consumer credit protection law
definitions.definition: Consumer protection law that regulates the extension of consumer credit, requiring fair terms and disclosure to borrowers, such as the US Consumer Credit Protection Act.

definitions.title: borrower disclosure requirement
definitions.definition: Disclosure requirement obliging a lender to give a borrower specified information about a loan product, conferring the borrower's product disclosure right.

definitions.title: reporting accountant
definitions.definition: Party role of an accountant responsible for preparing or attesting to the financial information in a regulatory report or filing.

definitions.title: securities trades reporting
definitions.definition: Post-trade process of reporting executed securities trades to a trade repository or regulator.

definitions.title: securities trade date position reporting
definitions.definition: Reporting of a party's securities positions as of a given trade date, used for regulatory position and transparency reporting.

definitions.title: register with regulatory authority
definitions.definition: Process step in which an issuer registers a securities offering with the relevant regulatory authority before it can be listed or sold.

definitions.title: filing details
definitions.definition: Document capturing the particulars of a regulatory filing, such as what was filed, when, and with which authority.
